title: Drosanthemum parvifolium
taxonomy: Drosanthemum parvifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. This plant is native to South Africa and is part of the genus Drosanthemum, which includes several succulent species. The genus Drosanthemum is classified under the subfamily Ruschioideae, which is a subfamily of the family Aizoaceae. The classification of Drosanthemum parvifolium is further detailed in botanical taxonomy, with its full classification as Drosanthemum parvifolium (Haw.) Schwantes. This plant's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
